entries.description: Architected and shipped multiple production platforms - security analyst tooling, phishing-resistant authentication infrastructure, and real-time workforce management. Full-stack across React, TypeScript, NestJS, Ruby on Rails, and AWS, serving 26,000+ organizations globally.
Shipped React features across subscription, social, and settings surfaces for EA Play's millions of subscribers. Built the Cube automation framework used by 25+ engineers in Jenkins CI/CD.
